mainEntity.name: What If My Hearing Loss Happened Slowly Over Ten Years?
mainEntity.text: What If My Hearing Loss Happened Slowly Over Ten Years?

acceptedAnswer.text: Worried that your hearing loss took years to develop? You can still file. Most noise-induced hearing loss happens slowly, and Utah law accounts for this "cumulative trauma." You don't need a single accident to qualify. As long as we can show the workplace was the cause, you have a case. Give us a ring at 801-746-0290 if you're in Boise or the SLC area and need help filing.
